/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import FiniteSet, ProductSet, Eq, S
from sympy.sets.handlers.issubset import is_subset_sets

a = FiniteSet(1, 2)
b = ProductSet(a, a)
c = FiniteSet((1, 1), (1, 2), (2, 1), (2, 2))
for lhs, rhs in [(b,c),(c,b)]:
    print('\\n', lhs, '<=', rhs)
    print('finite?', lhs.is_finite_set, rhs.is_finite_set)
    print('_eval_is_subset:', lhs._eval_is_subset(rhs))
    print('reverse _eval_is_superset:', rhs._eval_is_superset(lhs))
    print('dispatch:', is_subset_sets(lhs, rhs))
    i = lhs.intersect(rhs)
    print('intersection:', i, type(i), '== lhs?', i == lhs)
    print('is_subset:', lhs.is_subset(rhs))
print('b contains tuples:', [(e, b._contains(e), b.contains(e)) for e in c])
print('Eq simplify:', Eq(b,c).simplify())
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import FiniteSet, ProductSet, Eq, S
from sympy.sets.handlers.issubset import is_subset_sets

a = FiniteSet(1, 2)
b = ProductSet(a, a)
c = FiniteSet((1, 1), (1, 2), (2, 1), (2, 2))
for lhs, rhs in [(b,c),(c,b)]:
    print('\\n', lhs, '<=', rhs)
    print('finite?', lhs.is_finite_set, rhs.is_finite_set)
    print('_eval_is_subset:', lhs._eval_is_subset(rhs))
    print('reverse _eval_is_superset:', rhs._eval_is_superset(lhs))
    print('dispatch:', is_subset_sets(lhs, rhs))
    i = lhs.intersect(rhs)
    print('intersection:', i, type(i), '== lhs?', i == lhs)
    print('is_subset:', lhs.is_subset(rhs))
print('b contains tuples:', [(e, b._contains(e), b.contains(e)) for e in c])
print('Eq simplify:', Eq(b,c).simplify())
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import FiniteSet, ProductSet, Interval, Symbol, Range, S
from sympy.core.logic import fuzzy_and
x, y, n = Symbol('x', real=True), Symbol('y', real=True), Symbol('n', integer=True)
cases = [
    ProductSet(Interval(x, y), FiniteSet(1)),
    ProductSet(Range(n), FiniteSet(1)),
    ProductSet(S.Integers, FiniteSet(1)),
]
for a in cases:
    b = FiniteSet((1, 1))
    print('\\n', a, 'finite=', a.is_finite_set, 'iterable=', a.is_iterable)
    try:
        print('direct iteration handler:', fuzzy_and(b.contains(z) for z in a))
    except Exception as exc:
        print('handler raises:', type(exc).__name__, exc)
    print('current is_subset:', a.is_subset(b))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import FiniteSet, ProductSet, Interval, Symbol, Range, S
from sympy.core.logic import fuzzy_and
x, y, n = Symbol('x', real=True), Symbol('y', real=True), Symbol('n', integer=True)
cases = [
    ProductSet(Interval(x, y), FiniteSet(1)),
    ProductSet(Range(n), FiniteSet(1)),
    ProductSet(S.Integers, FiniteSet(1)),
]
for a in cases:
    b = FiniteSet((1, 1))
    print('\\n', a, 'finite=', a.is_finite_set, 'iterable=', a.is_iterable)
    try:
        print('direct iteration handler:', fuzzy_and(b.contains(z) for z in a))
    except Exception as exc:
        print('handler raises:', type(exc).__name__, exc)
    print('current is_subset:', a.is_subset(b))
PY"
